item.title: AI research startup Anthropic, the maker of Claude, has appointed Rahul Patil as its new CTO. Patil, an Indian-origin tech veteran, will lead Anthropic’s engineering operations across inference, products, infrastructure, and security. He succeeds co-founder Sa - instagram.com
item.description: AI research startup Anthropic, the maker of Claude, has appointed Rahul Patil as its new CTO. Patil, an Indian-origin tech veteran, will lead Anthropic’s engineering operations across inference, products, infrastructure, and security. He succeeds co-founder Sa  instagram.com
